column2: 魔法师学校，霍格沃兹感⏎⏎  大陆上最古老的势力之一，在屡次的灾难之中幸存并越发壮大。  ⏎    最初的魔法学院，由幽系部族演变而来（一个成员天生就是魔法师的部族），如今，它成为了严谨传授精灵魔法有关知识的教育机构。⏎    比起关在学校里闭门造车，魔法学院更主张让学生们深入自然，去更广袤的世界里感受精灵魔法的奥秘。⏎    并非所有的魔法师都需要进入魔法学院接受教育，但从学院毕业的孩子里，几乎没有平庸之辈。⏎⏎    此外，魔法学院立足于探索精灵魔法的真谛，以维持洛克与精灵世界的「平衡」为己任，因此与双方阵营交好，更得到了数位强大精灵王的认同。⏎    而作为最具历史的势力，魔法学院同时充满了许多不为人知秘密：比如除了学院在职/在读师生外，无人知道学院真正的所在地，以及前往那里的方法。
column7: 始终⏎Entire Storyline⏎(Start to Finish)
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：13-14⏎Age: 13-14⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   可爱呆萌，亲和度高，在钝钝的外表下，透出一丝坚毅勇敢的气质。初始服装的感受是非常爱户外冒险。⏎Appearance:⏎Adorably cute and highly approachable, with a hint of grit and bravery beneath a goofy exterior. His initial outfit gives off the strong impression of someone who loves outdoor adventures⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    虽然平时呆呆的，棱角不强烈，会犯点小迷糊，看起来很好欺负，但在关键时刻便会爆发热血和勇气的一面。⏎                    拥有着「坚毅」的特性，善恶观分明，大义凛然，有自己的原则和坚持。⏎Personality:⏎Though usually dorky and soft-edged, he is prone to little bouts of clumsiness, making him come off as an easy target. However, he explodes with passion and courage when it matters the most. Possessing the fortitude trait; he has a razor-sharp sense of right and wrong, is morally upright, principled, and unshakeable in his convictions⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    B1区域会加入现任学生团体「怪谈社」。⏎Backstory: Joins the Adventurer Club (a student org) in the B1 Main Storyline

column7: 始终⏎Entire Storyline⏎(Start to Finish)
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender:  Female⏎· 年龄：13-14⏎Age: 13-14⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    温顺柔和，亲和度高，在听话懂事的外表下，透露出一丝狡黠的气质。初始服装的感受是比较爱户外冒险。⏎Appearance:⏎Gentle and mild-mannered with high approachability; beneath her obedient and sensible exterior, there lies a hint of craftiness. Her initial outfit suggests a strong passion for outdoor adventures⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    在看起来乖巧的外表下，是一颗按捺不住的爱冒险的古灵精怪的心。⏎                    会偶尔展露出狡黠调皮的「萌」感，非常聪慧，脑子转得很快，遇事冷静。⏎Personality:⏎Beneath her well-behaved exterior lies a restless, adventurous heart full of whimsical energy. She also occasionally reveals a mischievous yet innocent charm. She is incredibly bright, quick-witted, and remains calm under pressure⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    B1区域会加入现任学生团体「怪谈社」。⏎Backstory: Joins the Adventurer Club (a student org) in the B1 Main Storyline

column7: A1-B1主线⏎A1-B1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：18⏎Age: 18⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    帅气高贵，身姿挺拔，一席红袍将他与普通学生区分开来；⏎                    脸上常挂着微笑，但却有一种天生的上位者气质，令人不易接近。⏎Appearance:⏎Handsome and noble with a tall, upright stature, his crimson robes immediately set him apart from other students. Though a smile often graces his face, he possesses a natural air of authority that makes him feel aloof and unapproachable.⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    偏执且疏离，平日里有些慵懒，对于俗世和普通人有一种虚假的「温柔」，本质上毫不在意。⏎                    喜欢独来独往，对在意之事会有强烈的目标感；而出于雪莉的原因，恩佐似乎对超常的力量颇感兴趣。⏎Personality:⏎Obsessive and detached, he often carries an air of mystery. He maintains a facade of gentleness toward the mundane world and ordinary people, though, in reality, he couldn't care less. A lone wolf by nature, he possesses a fierce sense of purpose regarding things he truly cares about; meanwhile, because of Sally, Enzo seems to have developed a profound interest in supernatural powers.⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    师从格里芬，天赋惊人，17岁便以在校生的身份，取得了「大魔法师」的称号。⏎                    现任学生团体「怪谈社」的会长，亦是数年前令该协会成员覆没的灾难中唯一的幸存者。⏎                    私下在研究（禁忌的）黑魔法，据说，他还有一只无人知其来历的精灵王宠物（小光）⏎Backstory: A disciple of Griffin with breathtaking natural talent, he earned the title of Archmage at just 17 years old while still a student. He currently serves as the President of the Adventurer Club, and is the sole survivor of the catastrophe that wiped out the club's entire membership years ago. In secret, he dabbles in forbidden Dark Magic; rumor has it he also possesses a Jini Sovereign of unknown origin named Lurix.
column10: · 大魔法师身份的体现⏎· 雪莉老师唯一的遗物——权杖⏎· 代表精灵——「叮叮恶魔」
column11: 只有经历过绝望，才会明白现行魔法的孱弱，一定…还有着更为强大的力量……
column12: Mysterious, Cunning, Edgey, Stubborn, Resolute, Caring.⏎⏎When introduced, Enzir seems like a normal and talented mage, truly dedicated to helping his fellow students and advancing in his field. He is also heavily trusted by the academy, and his confidence in his abilities can be clearly seen from his speech. But as the story progresses, he grows mysterious; there is a sense he is always hiding something. Furthermore, he begins to shatter the image you first perceive of him. He, without hesitation, breaks rules, gets the player and those around him into dangerous situations nobody else would, easily comes up with ideas to fool the enemy or those standing in his way, and seems to be obsessed with gaining power, even if it is taboo. He seems to have a clear goal in mind and will let nothing stop him from achieving it, though he does care for the player and his goal is tied to helping his teacher, Shirley.

column7: A1-B1主线⏎A1-B1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：27⏎Age: 27⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    衣着考究，举止优雅，秀气的面庞常常让人将他错认成女孩子。⏎Appearance:⏎Dressed in refined, impeccable attire and possessing elegant manners, his delicate features often lead people to mistake him for a girl⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    温文儒雅，善解人心，有着大多数男性老师不具备的细腻与温柔；⏎                    做事踏实负责，对孩子们的学习、生活有着事无巨细的关怀，有时候会被嫌啰嗦。⏎Personality:⏎Gentle and refined, he is highly perceptive of others' feelings, possessing a level of sensitivity and tenderness rarely seen in male teachers. He is grounded and responsible, showing meticulous care for every detail of the children's studies and daily lives, to the point where he is sometimes teased for being a bit of a nag⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    学生时代就是典型的优等生，认为学习能获得宁静，于是留校继续从事与学习相关的工作。⏎                    不认为提升强度是必修课，认知精灵的「趣味与独特性」，才是路易斯推行的学习主张。⏎Backstory: A cliché top-of-his class type since his younger, he believes that true inner peace is found through learning; this led him to remain at the academy to pursue a career in education. He doesn't believe that intense study and practice is a requirement for growth; instead, Luis advocates for a philosophy centered on recognizing the fun and uniqueness of each Jini.
column10: · 讲究优雅的审美趣味⏎· 因为性格好，收获了许多粉丝（男女老少都有）⏎· 代表精灵——「雪影娃娃」
column11: 希望每个孩子都能开开心心、茁壮成长，对了，还要记住时刻保持优雅~
column12: Kind, Conformist, Reliable, Dedicated⏎⏎Professor Luis is one of the player's main mentors. He is introduced as one of the Magic Academy’s most important personnel, someone the academy can rely on in any situation. He abides by the rules of the academy resolutely and would never entertain the thought of going rogue. He cares deeply about the player but also knows that he is special and does give the player some leeway.

column7: A1-主线⏎（间章，尾声）A1 Main Storyline (Interlude, Epilogue)
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female⏎· 年龄：17⏎Age: 17⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    野外研究人员的装束和打扮，有着热衷于户外活动留下的小麦色肌肤。⏎Appearance:⏎Dressed in the practical gear of a field researcher, she possess a sun-kissed, wheat-colored complexion, a mark of her passion for the great outdoors.⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    飒爽干练，性格独立，有着科研人员特有严谨气质与轻微的自负；⏎                    曾在校园中遭受过霸凌，所以选择了可以和他人保持距离的精灵研究工作；⏎                    内里其实是个热情直率的人，很想帮助别人，但由于疏于与人交流的缘故，容易因为率直得罪别人。⏎Personality:⏎Sharp and capable with an independent streak, she possesses the rigorous precision typical of a researcher, along with a touch of professional conceit. Having been bullied during her school days, she chose a career in Jini research specifically to maintain a comfortable distance from others. In reality, she is a warm and straightforward person who genuinely wants to help, though her lack of social skills often causes her bluntness to be mistaken for rudeness⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    师从罗兰。比起其他同龄的孩子，易西似乎很容易获得草系精灵的青睐；⏎                    因为古怪风卷的出现，被罗兰派来协助路易斯老师进行调查工作。⏎Backstory: A disciple of Roland. Compared to other children her age, Yessi seems to have a natural gift for winning the favor of Flora-class Jinies. Due to the emergence of the windstorm, she was dispatched by Roland to assist Professor Luis with the ongoing investigation
column10: ⏎· 户外探险家的衣着风格⏎· 随身携带着大量的调查报告⏎· 代表精灵——「奇丽草」
column11: 下次再这么冒失地陷入危险，本学姐可未必会救你哦……
column12: Knowledgeable, Academic, Nice⏎⏎One of the more straightforward characters. She's likeable, kind, and focuses on teaching the students, helping the player learn about the world, and is a mainstay at the Magic Academy.

column4: 皇室贵族⏎Royalty (Daughter of King Aindreas)
column7: A1-主线⏎晋升任务⏎A2-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline⏎Advancement Exam⏎A2 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female⏎· 年龄：13⏎Age: 13⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    白皙可爱，衣着奢华，头顶的两个大包彰显着她独特的审美趣味。⏎Appearance:⏎Fair-skinned and adorable, she is dressed in luxurious, high-end attire; the two large buns atop her head showcase her unique and quirky sense of style⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    刁蛮淘气，十分任性，「公主陛下」的超然身份让她喜欢捉弄别的同学；⏎                    而实际上，在看似小霸王的行为背后，是可丽对无聊的「王储生涯」的叛逆与反抗。⏎                    她讨厌宫廷戒律和古板的束缚，渴望在自由中释放天性，像其他孩子一样拥有放飞的童年；⏎                    但只有她最好的朋友菲尔特知道——外表强势的小公主，偶尔也会有因为寂寞哭鼻子的时候。⏎Personality:⏎Brash, mischievous, and incredibly headstrong, her elevated status as a princess, allows her to get away with playing pranks on her classmates. In reality, behind her little tyrant behavior lies a rebellion against the suffocating boredom of her life as an heir. She loathes courtly etiquette and rigid constraints, longing to release her true nature in freedom and have a carefree childhood like any other kid. But only her best friend, Furtis, knows that beneath her forceful exterior, this little princess occasionally cries from loneliness.⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    哥哥「韦恩」在册封大典上出糗后，让可丽成为预备接班人的流言就在王宫四起；⏎                    皇家留置地是可丽希亚10岁生日时，圣安德鲁国王送给她的生日礼物。⏎Backstory: After her older brother, Wayne, made a fool of himself during a royal ceremony, rumors began flying through the palace that Clarissa would become the next in line to the throne. The Royal Enclave is a gift given to her by King Aindreas on her tenth birthday
column10: · 胸前的祖母绿宝石是先祖「亚瑟」留下的宝物⏎· 对品味时尚有着自己的独特见解，和皮卡很有共同话题⏎· 代表精灵——「呆小路」、「火花」
column11: 本公主的话举足轻重，禁止顶嘴！
column12: Simplistic, Honorable, Battle-hungry, Royal Condescension⏎⏎Quite an easy to read character. She sees the world through Jini Duels and respects those who are strong and always willing to battle. Though, her royal upbringing means she talks down to almost everyone around her, she does so without malice and, at times, it gives her an endearing quality.

column7: A1-主线⏎A2-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline⏎A2 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：13⏎Age:  13⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    可爱，包里装着许多烹饪用具和食材；⏎Appearance:⏎Adorable, with a bag packed full of cooking utensils and fresh ingredients⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    胆小，但愿意为朋友挺身而出；⏎                    父亲是在水系地区人鱼湾闻名的饭店老板，因进宫为圣安德鲁陛下做饭，而带上了菲尔特。⏎                    初到王国城堡的菲尔特，遭到了许多贵族小孩的欺负，只有一个粉头发的小女孩霸气地保护了她；⏎                    后来，菲尔特和这个女孩成为了朋友，方才知晓她的真实身份——王国的公主，可丽希亚。⏎Personality:⏎Timid by nature, yet always willing to stand up for his friends. His father is a renowned chef from the aquatic region of Mermaid Bay, who brought Furtis along when he was summoned to the palace to cook for King Aindreas. Upon his arrival at the Citadel, Furtis was bullied by many noble children, only to be shielded by the bold protection of a little girl with pink hair. It was only after they became friends that Furtis discovered her true identity—Clarissa, the Princess of the Kingdom⏎· 重要过往：⏎
column10: · 额头的护目镜，是爸爸曾经送他的生日礼物，对他很重要⏎· 代表精灵——「水蓝蓝」
column12: Meek yet aggressive if need be, Humorous.⏎⏎As Krithya's companion, Furtis's main job is trying to rein her in, but since Krithya is quite troublesome, he ends up doing damage control. He is a bit comical and is mostly friendly, but you do get a sense that he feels bad for the people who end up facing Krithya in his dialogue.⏎

column7: B1-主线⏎B1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：未知（本人已经忘记了，大约在150岁左右）⏎Age: Unknown (Griffin himself has forgotten,  approximately 150 years old)⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    身材高大，耄耋老者，衣着朴素大气，有着历经世事之后的从容与淡定。⏎Appearance:⏎A tall, respected elder who's well into old age; he dresses in simple yet dignified attire, possessing a sense of composure and calm that comes from a lifetime of experience.⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    乐观豁达，睿智洞察，不拘形式，充满正义，是个爱开玩笑的慈祥老爷爷；⏎                    虽然老到快要记不得岁数的年纪，依旧不改年少时的顽皮，喜欢琢磨有趣的「小」玩意儿。⏎                    源于强大的实力，总是一副恃无恐的淡然，无论面对何种危险，总能保持绝对的冷静；⏎                    表面上嘻嘻笑笑、不太正经，但据说真正认真起来（对敌）的样子，其实是十分惊人的。⏎Personality:⏎Optimistic, broad-minded, and possessing a keen insight, he is a jovial, justice-driven grandfather figure who cares little for formality. Though he is so old he has nearly lost count of his age, he retains the playfulness of his youth, always tinkering with gadgets and odd trinkets. Backed by immense power, he carries an air of fearless composure, remaining absolutely unshakable in the face of any danger. While he may seem like a grinning, easygoing old man on the surface, word has it that his truly serious side that he only reveals in battle is nothing short of terrifying⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    被誉为200年间最强大的魔法师，在80年前担任了魔法学院院长一职；⏎                    「咕噜球」的发明者，学术、爱好广泛，就连炼金术也颇为高深。⏎Backstory: Hailed as the most powerful mage in two hundred years, he assumed the position of Headmaster of the Magic Academy eighty years ago. As the inventor of the Buddy Pod, his academic pursuits and hobbies are vast, extending even to the profound depths of alchemy
column10: · 大魔法师尊崇身份的体现⏎· 代表精灵——「火羽」
column11: 吼吼！老夫看你骨骼清奇，想必是块做魔法师的好材料~
column12: ⏎⏎Wise, Wise-cracking, Forward-looking, Aura of overwhelming strength, exudes happiness.⏎⏎Spending over a century as one of the strongest Jini mages has given him a confidence like no other, meaning he can do as he pleases at most times. Lucky for the player and those in the Magic Academy, that mostly means he spends his days as an eccentric elder, who loves jokes, bringing happiness to everyone, and tinkering with new ideas. He's never dismissive and looks at things with an open mind, but do not test him. He is not the Headmaster for nothing.⏎

column7: B1-主线⏎B1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：107⏎Age: 107⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    身材矮胖，但行动迅捷，星空纹路的法袍似乎隐藏着与幻系精灵有关的秘密。⏎Appearance:⏎While being tiny and plump, yet remarkably swift in motion, his star-patterned robes seem to harbor secrets linked to Stellar-class Jini.⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    严肃认真，一丝不苟，是个不苟言笑的倔强老头，喜欢强调校园的纪律性。⏎                    身为学院的元老级人物，是陪伴在格里芬院长身边最久的老师。⏎                    对于格里芬的任性总是无可奈何，于是只能自己承担起了治理学院秩序的重任。⏎                    其实迪兰并非看上去这么古板，在无需执教的时候，他偶尔也会因为品鉴可瓦斯而酩酊大醉。⏎Personality:⏎Strict, serious, and meticulous, he is a stubborn old man of few words who constantly emphasizes discipline. As a founding member of the academy, he is the teacher who has stood by Headmaster Griffin’s side the longest. Often left helpless by Griffin’s impulsive whims, he has taken it upon himself to bear the heavy burden of maintaining order within the school. In truth, Dillan is not as rigid as he appears; during his time off, he has been known to get roaring drunk after indulging in a fine Rocowass tasting⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    为了吸纳王国境内的强力魔法师，迪兰设立了用于挑选「大魔法师」的竞赛。——「先驱魔法师竞赛」⏎Backstory: In order to recruit the most powerful mages within the kingdom, Dillan established a competition to select the next Archmages—the Pioneer Mage Trials
column10: · 代表精灵——暂无
column11: 肃静肃静！再有调皮捣蛋的小家伙，挑战神殿就此关闭！
column12: Stern, and meticulous, a man of few words.⏎Tone-wise, he is the complete opposite of Griffin. No jokes, no jovial and light hearted tone. Speaks like a stern principal, very sharp and straight to the point. Very few ellipses and exclamation marks.⏎Though, when drunk, he does loosen up. He speaks more like a fun uncle when inebriated, but he doesn't blabber.

column7: A2-主线⏎（实习线）⏎A2 Main Storyline ⏎(Internship Arc)
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：34⏎Age:  34⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   挺括风衣，粗硬胡茬，历经风霜的防风镜之后，是让人看不清真实想法的冷峻眼神。⏎Appearance:⏎Clad in a sharp, structured trench coat with a layer of coarse stubble, he wears weathered goggles that mask a pair of cold, grim eyes, making it impossible to discern his true thoughts⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   沉默寡言，心性稳重，作风硬派，喜欢在野外溜达，没人知道他到底在干啥；⏎                   不同于囿于象牙塔内的其他老师，社会经验丰富的沃尔克，更推崇学生们外出历险，做实战派。⏎                   看似对学生有着不近人情的苛刻标准，暗中却会默默保护孩子们的安全。（被发现了会假装路过）⏎Personality:⏎Reserved, steady, and hard-boiled in his ways, he enjoys wandering the wilderness, though no one knows exactly what he is up to. Unlike other teachers confined to their ivory towers, the street-smart Walker encourages students to go out on adventures and have practical experience. Though he seems to hold his students to inhumanly harsh standards, he secretly watches over them to ensure their safety, and, if caught, he simply pretends he was just passing by⏎· 重要过往：⏎                   曾经就职于「福尔摩卡侦探社」，因此具备着运用精灵魔法解决案件的特殊能力。⏎Backstory: Formerly employed by the Formoka Detective Agency, he possesses the specialized ability to utilize Jini Magic to solve criminal cases.
column10: · 上班族的打扮，风尘仆仆，并不优雅⏎· 过往侦探生活的代表物（烟斗？）⏎· 代表精灵——酷拉
column11: 学院只是成长的温室，外面的世界可绝不会像这般安全
column12: An avid outdoors-man with a hardboiled grit.⏎He doesn't explain what he does outdoors so he does come off a bit mysterious. He has a rock-solid temperament, so he is not quick to anger, sadness, or most emotions.⏎Should have the tone of a seasoned, experienced, and mature middle-aged man. He is not exactly stiff; he cares deeply for his students so, in certain moments, a light hearted joke is acceptable. He is calm so not too many exclamation marks.

column7: B1-主线⏎B1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female⏎· 年龄：31⏎Age: 31⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                    精密严谨的教导主任装扮，收敛古板的中青年女性感受。有些闷骚的感觉，隐藏著内心的活泼爱冒险。⏎                    对星星魔法非常纯熟，从平凡的外表完全看不出，意外地非常厉害！⏎Appearance:⏎Dressed in precise, rigorous attire, like only a Dean of Students can, she projects the image of a reserved and old-fashioned middle-aged woman. There is a sense of closet-eccentricity about her, a subtle hint that she hides a lively and adventurous heart beneath her professional exterior. She is exceptionally skilled in Starry Magic; one would never guess from her unassuming appearance that she is, in fact, remarkably powerful!⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    对基础训练非常重视，作为基础课老师，经常会唠唠叨叨，带点教导主任的感觉。⏎                    从年轻时的爱慕虚荣过度到了坚毅、内心平静，并收敛锋芒潜心磨练的角色，因此给人感受有点古板。⏎                    但因为本质上还是个活泼爱冒险的人，所以经常会绷不住，出现搞笑的桥段。⏎Personality:⏎She places immense value on fundamental training; as a foundational skills teacher, she can be a bit of a nag, carrying that distinct Dean of Students energy. Having transitioned from a vain youth to a woman of grit and inner peace, she now conceals her brilliance to focus on quiet self-improvement—a transformation that often makes her appear a bit stiff. However, because she is still a lively adventurer at heart, she frequently fails to maintain her serious facade, leading to plenty of comedic moments⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    曾经年少时爱冒险，基础不好便糊里糊涂出去冒险，在冒险的过程中涉险。幸而被星耀独角兽救下。⏎                    意气相投的独角兽，借给杰瑞西“星星魔法”，以期让她注意保护自己。⏎                    杰瑞西非常爱慕虚荣，想要在众人面前大肆炫耀星星魔法，想不到星星魔法却失效了，因此出糗。⏎                    失去了星星魔法的加持，杰瑞西潜心磨练自己，最终凭借日复一日的锻炼，自力成为了星星魔法大师。⏎                    因此，杰瑞西当老师后，非常注意指导学生的魔法基础，希望大家认识到旅途中非常危险，不能想当然地应对。⏎                    在那之后，独角兽和她的关系也逐渐转好，更像是有点距离的挚友，会默默保护她不涉险。⏎                    可以借助星耀独角兽达成特殊的魔法——如：空间魔法的使用⏎Backstory: In her youth, her thirst for adventure far outweighed her skills. She recklessly set out on a journey with a poor understanding of the basics and quickly found herself in mortal danger. Fortunately, she was rescued by an Auridra. Sensing a kindred spirit, the Auridra lent its Starry Magic to Jercie, hoping it would help her protect herself. However, driven by vanity, Jercie tried to flaunt this borrowed power before a crowd, only for the magic to fail, leaving her utterly humiliated. After losing the Auridra's blessing, she dedicated herself to rigorous training, eventually becoming a Starry Magic master through sheer, persistent effort. Now a teacher, Jercie is obsessed with her students' fundamentals, warning them that the world is a dangerous place where one cannot rely on luck or assumptions. Over time, her bond with the Auridra hpmended; they are now like distant best friends, with the Auridra silently watching over her. Through their connection, she can even perform extraordinary feats, such as Space Magic
column10: · 古板的打扮，看起来有点难缠的教导主任形象⏎· 看似搞笑的教鞭，实则是超级厉害的星星魔法法杖⏎· 关系好的精灵——星耀独角兽
column12: Of all the Academy teachers, she seems to be the most fussy. She places immense importance on training, so she should have a nagging tone, like a strict Dean. A lot of exclamation marks should be used when she's going off on the students.⏎She has evolved from a vain youth to a resilient woman with inner peace, so she does come off stiff and old-fashioned.⏎However, despite this, she is still a young adventure at heart.  She let's her serious facade slip many times, creating very humorous moments. She should seem a bit flustered when she does, at these points, ellipses work best.⏎⏎⏎⏎

column5: 学院创始人⏎Founder of the Magic Academy
column7: B1-主线⏎B1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female⏎· 年龄：1800⏎Age: 1800⏎⏎  幻系精灵王，亦是魔法学院的初代校长，因奇特的经历，成为半人半龙的存在；⏎  虽长着少女面貌，但真实的年龄已经千余岁，所以说话有一种老气横秋的感觉。⏎⏎A Jini Sovereign of Stellar-class Magic and the founding Headmaster of the Magic Academy; due to a peculiar twist of fate, she exists as a half-human, half-dragon being. Though she possesses the appearance of a young girl, her true age exceeds a thousand years, giving her a manner of speaking that is world-weary and archaic⏎⏎  小孩状态的她：因为失去了记忆而变得呆萌，有对绩点的天然的渴望，有点暴力（力气超大）但不自知。⏎⏎Freya as a small child: Due to her memory loss, she has become quite airheaded and dorky, yet she possesses a natural, instinctive craving for a high GPA. She has a bit of a violent streak as she possess immense physical strength, though she is completely unaware of her own power⏎⏎  收复所有记忆长大的她：变得沉稳了许多，冷静独断，有些淡漠，但强势的那一面深入骨子里，不会改变；⏎⏎  在灾变之战时期的「学院保卫战」中，芙蕾雅曾经为了保护受袭的同学们而牺牲了自己；⏎  在最后的时刻，她封存了自己的部分力量与记忆，等待未来某天，有人能得到这份传承，彻底解除噩梦的危机。⏎⏎Freya when she gets her memory back: She becomes far more composed, calm, decisive, and somewhat detached yet her inherent strength remains etched into her very core, unyielding as ever. During the defense of the academy in the era of the great catastrophe, Freya sacrificed herself to protect her classmates from an onslaught. In her final moments, she sealed away a portion of her power and memories, waiting for the day someone might inherit her legacy and finally bring an end to the Nightmare
column12: Without her memories, she is clumsy, extremely vulnerable, and innocent. She makes the people around her want to take care of her and protect her, this feeling should be conveyed in the dialogue. Ellipses can be used when she's nervous and unsure. She's doesn't shout much, so not too many exclamation marks.⏎However, she is still immensely strong and can be violent without realizing.⏎One of the only times, she seems a bit more certain is when she's obsessing over her grades.⏎With her memories, she is calm, composed, and assertive. A complete 180. She even seems indifferent but only because she knows she is one of the strongest ever. Less ellipses and more exclamation marks in contrast to her other self.⏎

column6: VIP跟随精灵⏎吉祥物之一⏎A VIP Following Jini that Serves as a Mascot
column7: 序章，A1-主线⏎Prologue, A1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：50⏎Age: 50⏎· 现实/神话原型：海德薇⏎Mythological Origin: Hedwig⏎⏎· 外观特征：⏎                   和无数学院的魔法猫头鹰一样，个性的从来不是它们的外观，而是充满服务意识的性格。⏎Appearance:⏎Like the countless other magical owls of the academy, what defines them is never their physical appearance, but rather their profound sense of service⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   绅士风度，热心而又十分有礼貌，一口倍儿正宗的英国伦敦腔，揭示了它绅士的自我认知；⏎                   充满服务精神，对待服务于小魔法师的工作勤勤恳恳，再苦再累都不会有怨言，令人动容。⏎Personality:⏎Possessing a true gentleman’s flair, he is warm-hearted and impeccably polite; his pitch-perfect London accent reveals a deep-seated self-identity as a refined gentleman. Driven by an unwavering spirit of service, he is tireless in his duties to the young mages. His diligent, hardworking nature—never uttering a single word of complaint no matter how grueling the task—is truly moving⏎· 重要过往：⏎                   去年在学院内部的最佳猫头鹰评选中，荣获「五星向导」的殊荣，从此更加努力地激励自己工作。⏎Backstory: In last year's academy-wide Best Owl awards, he was honored with the prestigious title of Master Guide. Since then, he has pushed himself to work even harder, using the accolade as constant inspiration
column10: · 魔法猫头鹰是个庞大的家族，不同颜色的猫头鹰各具本领⏎· 如果LULU和某只小同学特别聊得来，可以缔结契约⏎· LULU是罕见的、不愿进入咕噜球中生活的精灵之一
column12: Academic, Clumsy, Animated, Father-figure⏎⏎As the first character the player interacts with, Mr. Hoolu's lovable yet clumsy nature is on display, it is even a plot point for one of the player's first missions. However, as an esteemed member of the Hoolu family and master guide, he does command respect. He has an eloquent way with words, more so than most characters and cares for the player much like a father

column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：14⏎Age: 14⏎· 外貌特征：⏎脏兮兮的小男孩，有自己的审美，喜爱暴力和明亮欢快的东西。⏎对冒险和耍酷很感兴趣，所以有自己的穿搭（混搭），偏向于牛仔和蒸汽朋克结合的风格。⏎Appearance:⏎A scruffy little boy with a distinct aesthetic of his own, he has a penchant for both rough-and-tumble action and things that are bright and cheerful. Fueled by an interest in adventuring and looking cool, he has developed his own signature look—a mashup style that leans heavily into a fusion of Cowboy and Steampunk elements⏎· 性格特征：⏎留守儿童，性格狂躁，崇拜暴力美学，用此来消解内心层层叠叠的孤独。⏎讲究兄弟义气，很迷恋做大哥庇护他人的感觉。⏎思想简单，一切都用拳头解决，在这个以精灵力量胜负的世界，倒也有一番独自的美学。⏎Personality:⏎He is a child who grew up without his parents around with a volatile temperament. He worships the aesthetic of violence as a way to dissolve the layers of profound loneliness within him. He lives by a strict code of brotherhood, obsessed with the feeling of being a big brother who protects others. Simple-minded and prone to solving every problem with his fists, he has carved out his own unique philosophy in a world where Jini duels usually decide everything⏎· 重要过往：⏎在村子里长大的留守儿童。⏎手下有同样留守的红波绿波，作为威风组的老大，费得在组织内部具有绝对权威。⏎该角色对人鱼湾有着深厚的感情，保护它的目的是希望父亲能看到人鱼湾的美景⏎Backstory: An abandoned child who grew up in the village, Fedor serves as the leader of the Majesty Squad, where he wields absolute authority over his subordinates, Redd and Greene—who were also abandoned. He harbors a deep, profound affection for Mermaid Bay; his true mission in protecting it is the hope that, one day, his father will finally return to behold its breathtaking beauty
column12: A lonely kid at heart with a violent temperament. In a world full of magic, he chooses to solve matters with his fist, giving him a more unique vibe.⏎Abrasive and provoking language should be used, like that of a young street thug who doesn't know any better.⏎For those he does like, he is fiercely loyal and tries his best to come off like a big brother. Lots of exclamation marks should be used.

column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：14⏎Age: 14⏎· 外貌特征：⏎脏兮兮的小男孩，有自己的审美，喜爱暴力和明亮欢快的东西。⏎对冒险和耍酷很感兴趣，所以有自己的穿搭（混搭），偏向于牛仔和蒸汽朋克结合的风格。⏎Appearance:⏎Scruffy little boys with distinct aesthetics of their own. They have a penchant for both rough-and-tumble action and things that are bright and cheerful. Driven by a passion for adventure and looking cool, They have a signature style—an eclectic mashup that blends Western cowboy grit with a Steampunk edge⏎· 性格特征：⏎留守儿童，性格狂躁，父母长年在外工作，与奶奶相依为命。虽然在学校很调皮捣蛋，但对奶奶十分孝顺。在费得的带领下崇拜暴力美学，用此来消解内心层层叠叠的孤独。⏎讲究兄弟义气，很迷恋“匡扶正义”，用拳头打天下的感觉。其实是在过家家一样。⏎费得说得对！没什么主见，但讲义气，热血少年。⏎Personality:⏎Abandoned children with volatile temperaments, they lived with their grandmother while their parents worked away from home for years at a time. Although they are notorious troublemakers at school, they are deeply devoted and filial to their grandmother. Under Fedor's leadership, they have come to worship the aesthetic of violence as a way to dispel the layers of profound loneliness within them⏎They are fiercely loyal to their friends and are obsessed with the idea of upholding justice, dreaming of conquering the world with their fists—though in reality, it’s mostly just a game of make-believe. They rarely have a mind of their own, always following Fedor’s lead with a passionate 'Fedor is right!' At their hearts, they are hot-blooded youths who live for their comrades.⏎· 重要过往：⏎在村子里长大的留守儿童，非常思念自己去彼得大道务工的父母。⏎看起来强硬，实则脆弱。⏎Backstory: Abandoned children raised in the village. They deeply miss their parents, who are away working on Peter Avenue. Though they put on a tough and unyielding front, they are, in reality, quite fragile.
column12: Much like Fedor, he has lived his live away from his parents, so is hiding a deep loneliness. He is manic and violent, and is a well-known troublemaker. However, without his parents around, he has depended on his grandmother most of his life and is extremely devoted to her, only caring what she thinks.⏎He sees Fedor as a mentor and listens to everything he says. He also follows Fedor's methods of carrying out justice with fists and will defend his friends to no end. Much like Fedor, he should have the vibe of a classic abrasive shounen protagonist, hot-blooded and impulsive. Many exclamation marks can be used.

column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：14⏎Age: ⏎· 外貌特征：⏎穿着类似哥哥风机委员会的制服，看起来有点高傲和孤僻。⏎优雅的贵族穿搭，和暴躁的发型，搭配出一个比较叛逆的小刺头形象。⏎Appearance:⏎Dressed in a student council-style uniform with a haughty, loner vibe. He's got an elegant noble aesthetic mixed with angry hair, pulling off that rebellious, edgy look perfectly⏎· 性格特征：⏎自尊心爆炸强，想要孔雀开屏地证明自己。⏎其实源于内心的自卑，被优秀的哥哥卡门盖过了全部光芒，难以发现自己的优势。⏎有点爱慕虚荣和面子，但骨子里是少年的倔强。⏎Personality:⏎Driven by an overinflated ego and a desperate need for validation, he strives to outshine everyone. This bravado masks a profound inferiority complex born from being overshadowed by his perfect brother, Carmen. Despite his vanity and thirst for status, he possesses a gritty, youthful determination that won't let him back down⏎· 重要过往：⏎莫扎特家族的成员，以后一个完美的精英哥哥莫扎特·卡门；⏎跟随在卡门阴影下，无论如何努力也难以超越的无力感。⏎虽隶属于莫扎特家族，但卡普对家族的行事风格却并不认同，未来必将改过自新，走上正确之路。⏎Backstory: As a Mozart, Kap is constantly measured against his perfect older brother, Carmen. He struggles with a profound sense of futility, unable to outshine Carmen regardless of his efforts. However, Kap doesn’t align with the family’s questionable values. His arc is one of transformation—moving from a place of vanity and immaturity toward a future where he reforms and chooses the right path
column12: A classic show-off with a huge amount of self-esteem, always boasting and trying to prove that he is better than everyone.⏎However, this stems from living in the shadow of his exceptional older brother, so he is more exasperating than annoying. He speaks confidently and is not afraid to take on a challenge, but when it doesn't go his way, he can fuddle through his words in an attempt to save face, giving him some humorous moments.⏎At his core, he's just a stubborn kid, who never gives up, so emphasis should be put on his never give up attitude and not on his peacocking in serious moments. Moderate amounts of exclamation marks and ellipses can be used.

column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female⏎· 年龄：16⏎Age: 16⏎· 外貌特征：⏎衣着风格感鲜明，是莎莉自己的时尚追求，喜欢轻飘飘、柔软和充满幻想感的装扮。⏎感受上有着女孩子的少女心和小孩子对未知的冒险追求，魔法感很强的角色。⏎Appearance:⏎Sally possesses a distinct and vivid sense of style that reflects her personal fashion philosophy. She adores clothing that is airy, soft, and steeped in fantasy. Her aesthetic captures the delicate heart of a young girl combined with a child-like hunger for adventure into the unknown—a character radiating a powerful sense of magic⏎· 性格特征：⏎玲珑机灵，解语花一般的存在，机灵古怪，因此和可丽希亚玩的来。                   ⏎可丽希亚公主的侍女和好闺蜜，是页游远古剧情的重要角色，通常只在相关剧情中登场。⏎Personality:⏎Smart, witty, and deeply empathetic, she shares a playful and eccentric bond with Princess Clarissa. Serving as both the Princess’s attendant and closest friend, she is a vital character from the game’s early lore, usually making exclusive appearances in related historical plotlines⏎· 重要过往：⏎她曾是服装店店主，后来成为公主的贴身侍女，性格忠心、温柔.⏎但因公主的身份高贵，常常会感受到“被指手画脚”的尴尬局面。⏎Backstory: Formerly a boutique owner, she eventually became the Princess's personal attendant. While she is deeply loyal and gentle by nature, the Princess’s high-born status often puts her in awkward positions where she feels ordered around or micromanaged
column12: She is exceptionally clever and quick-witted, almost like she knows what everyone is thinking. She resembles the servants in popular TV and anime that seem to be smarter than their masters but likes to keep it hidden.⏎She is also mischievous and quirky which is why she gets along well with Princess Clarissa. She should have intelligent yet funny dialogue; the kind where some might have to read twice.

column5: 纯原创，签到活动用⏎An Original Character for the Daily Log-in Event
column9: . 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：20⏎Age: 20⏎· 外貌特征：⏎长相豪放粗犷，冒险感和野生感强，力量感强。⏎Appearance:⏎Rugged and bold features; strong wild and adventurous aesthetic; possesses a powerful, muscular build⏎· 性格特征：⏎胆大心细，不畏困难。风风火火的有点粗心。⏎因为自己对独特和孤独感同身受，所以格外喜欢珍稀精灵，决定不辞万里也要寻找他们。⏎但是自己的力量有限，决定成立社团，动员大家的力量。⏎Personality:⏎He is bold yet attentive, facing hardships without fear. Though his fiery, full-steam-ahead nature can sometimes lead to moments of carelessness. Because he knows the sting of being different and lonely, he has a special bond with rare Jinies and is determined to travel thousands of miles to find them. Realizing his own strength has limits, he decided to form a club to mobilize everyone’s collective power⏎· 重要过往：⏎珍稀精灵调查团的团长，魔法学院的学生⏎从小没有家人，把精灵视为家人一样的存在。⏎Backstory: The Founder of the Rare Jini Seekers Squad and a student at the Magic Academy. Having grown up without a family, he views Jinies as his true kin, cherishing them as if they were his own flesh and blood
column12: A fiery, bold, yet meticulous man with a great love for rare Jinies. He leads students in searches for Jinies, knowing that he cannot do everything alone and advises lonely students to think of Jini as family. He's a well-natured and caring mentor, though his love for searching for Jinies and fiery persona can lead to carelessness. In general, calm yet passionate language should be used with minimal exclamation marks.⏎

column7: A1主线⏎A2-1主线⏎A1 Main Storyline⏎A2-1 Main Storyline
column9: ⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：30（外貌上）⏎Age: 30⏎· 外貌特征：⏎和主角的面相有一定的相似之处，部分还原页游，但页游的形象是当上亚瑟王之后了，这里是一个青年版本的⏎服装制式为盔甲，看起来和壁画所绘类似，配色也是一样。可能会给玩家发保护头盔和斗篷的时装，这两点和⏎模型中的两点是一致的。⏎Appearance:⏎Sharing a striking resemblance to the MC, this is a younger version of the character seen in the early game (where he had already become King Arthiel). He wears a signature set of armor that perfectly matches the historical murals. In-game, he may gift players a protective helmet and cloak, both of which are directly modeled after his own distinctive gear⏎· 性格特征：⏎坚定勇敢，似乎是完美的角色，真诚善良，吸引精灵王陪伴在他左右。⏎实力很强，深不见底，一个符号化的角色。⏎Personality:⏎Steadfast and brave, he is a perfect character whose innate goodness attracts Jini Sovereigns to accompany him. His power is endless and overwhelming; he functions as a symbolic icon within the world rather than just a common warrior⏎· 重要过往：⏎旧时被玛丽在宫廷中排挤，吃尽了苦头，但最终推翻了紫雀花王朝的残酷统治，迎来了洛克王国的纪元。⏎Backstory: In the days of old, he was marginalized and persecuted by Mary within the royal court, enduring untold hardships. Ultimately, he rose to overthrow the cruel reign of the Violaethran Dynasty, ushering in the glorious new era of the Roco Kingdom
column12: The epitome of courage in this world, a perfect hero and king. All Jinies love him and the Jini Sovereigns never wanted to leave his side. He is exceptionally kind and gentle, yet wields unfathomable power. He must speak like a caring and all-knowing father at most times. A bit of humor is good, but it should not be the main focus. No exclamation marks or ellipses if possible; he is always calm and strong.⏎

column7: A2-1主线⏎A2-1 Main Storyline
column9: ⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：51⏎Age: 51⏎· 外貌特征：⏎圣安德鲁尊贵的装扮上，偶尔会出现一些不易发现的可爱装饰，透露着这位长者活泼的内心。（也可能是可丽希亚偷偷放上去的）⏎Appearance:⏎Upon King Aindreas's noble and dignified attire, one might occasionally spot subtle, hidden touches of cuteness, tiny decorations that reveal the elder's lively inner spirit. (Though, in truth, they might just be little surprises secretly planted there by Princess Clarissa.)⏎· 性格特征：⏎为如今的王国鞠躬尽瘁，是个很富有负责心的国王。⏎但天生便缺乏治理的才能，所以常常做出一些并不高明的决策来。⏎威严的模样下，却有着不为人知的玩闹之心。尤其在女儿面前，偶尔表现出有趣的一面。（本质上是个老顽童）⏎Personality:⏎A devoted ruler who gives his all to the kingdom, driven by a profound sense of duty. Despite his best efforts, he lacks a natural gift for politics, often leading to questionable decision-making. Though he maintains a dignified aura, he harbors a secret love for fun and games—an old soul with a young heart who shows his funniest side to his beloved daughter.⏎· 重要过往：⏎除了作为君王的严谨，圣安德鲁还很幽默，爱热闹、爱玩。⏎他最大的爱好是视察王国，微服出巡；却常常因此遭遇意外。⏎圣安德鲁的精灵，是自幼就陪伴他长大的草头大眼鸭。（长得有点滑稽，但他并不嫌弃）⏎Backstory:⏎King Aindreas balances his royal duties with a humorous, fun-loving personality. He loves nothing more than wandering his kingdom in disguise, though his incognito tours frequently end in hilarious mishaps. His Jini is a duck that grew up with him. Despite the Jini’s goofy and slightly ridiculous look, King Aindreas remains its most devoted and unashamed companion.
column12: Much like Griffin, he is an important old man in this world with the soul of a kid. He is incredibly humorous and loves playing around, especially around his daughter. Though, he is still a responsible monarch, fully dedicated to the kingdom. However, he does not quite have the talent to govern a kingdom, so his plans don't always work out. In general, he should be more jovial and light hearted than most characters, but still have the air of a respected king. He is not clumsy but playful, it his schemes not actions per say that lead to mishaps.⏎

column7: B1-主线⏎A2-1主线⏎B1 Main Storyline ⏎A2-1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：27⏎Age: 27⏎⏎  一天到晚埋首工作的国务大臣，亲和帅气的模样令他成为城堡的「看板郎」。⏎  麦斯威尔的业务能力很强，负责王国的日常事务，专长是讲道理。⏎  在国王「微服私访」的期间警察替他收拾一些烂摊子，由此也打磨了他圆滑的性格，而且喜欢拉着听者不停地说教。（是个话痨）⏎⏎  麦斯威尔算是有勇有谋的能臣，曾用「特洛伊木马」一计，帮助魔法学院新生们逃出了黑魔法师的奴役。⏎  虽然平时总是一副笑眯眯的忠厚老实的样子，但麦斯威尔似乎隐藏了什么巨大的秘密，并不为人所知。⏎Buried in paperwork all day, the handsome and charismatic Maswell is the face of the castle. An elite administrator, his primary weapon is his mastery of debate and reasoning. Years of managing the fallout from the King's secret outings have made him socially adept, albeit a bit of a long-winded nag. Though he is a brilliant strategist known for saving students from Dark Wizards, his kind smile may be masking a deep and mysterious secret

column7: A2-1主线⏎A2-3主线⏎A2-1 Main Storyline ⏎A2-3 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男 ⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：29⏎Age: 29⏎  王国的外交大臣，也是麦斯威尔的挚友，他们从小一起长大。⏎  奥贝斯坦的性格绝对理性，理性到有时会让人感到冷酷无情，因此被称作「干冰之剑」。⏎⏎  因为外交大臣的职能，奥贝斯坦需要往来于诸国；危险的异国之旅让他练就了一身精湛的剑术。⏎  冷面的奥贝斯坦表面不近人情，但其实充满了正直与情义——为了解决黑魔法师组织的阴谋，他只身打入敌人内部获取情报，甘愿变成了背负「背叛王国」罪名的卧底。⏎  为此，他不惜故意冷落挚友麦斯威尔，不愿将他卷入其中。⏎⏎Maswell’s childhood friend and the Minister of Foreign Affairs, known as Ice Blade for his ruthlessly logical personality. His dangerous diplomatic missions have made him a lethal swordsman. Though he appears aloof and indifferent, he is secretly a hero of great justice. He sacrificed his reputation to go undercover within a Dark Wizard organization, bearing the shame of a traitor to save the realm. He even staged a fallout with Maswell to ensure his friend’s safety.

column7: A2-1主线、实习线⏎A2-1 Main Storyline, Internship Arc
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：25⏎Age: 25⏎  王国的白银骑士团团长，看上去永远充满斗志的家伙。⏎  兰斯洛出身于剑术世家，据说他的先祖，是传说中依靠洛克自身的力量击败了强大精灵的「圣龙骑士」。⏎  剑术是兰斯洛家族的荣耀，亦是他们不愿放弃的才能。⏎  因此，即便在如今这个精灵魔法成为主流的时代，兰斯洛和他手下白银骑士的精锐们，依旧虔诚地训练着圣龙骑士留下的古老剑技。⏎⏎  多年以前，白银骑士团的规模远比如今更加繁荣。作为王国城堡的右护卫，兰斯洛与左护卫特伦斯情同手足，共同维护着王国统治的屹立不倒。⏎  黑魔法与噩梦的猖獗，迫使特伦斯带领近半的武装力量远赴怀特冰川，成为了在极地苦苦支撑的「冰封骑士」。⏎  特伦斯的远走他乡，让兰斯洛的心中仿佛缺了一块；自此兰斯洛推却了所有贵族女性抛来的婚约，生活地越发孤独起来。⏎⏎  此外，兰斯洛曾经最信赖的大弟子，也因为观念上的分歧而退出了白银骑士。⏎  如今，这名弟子早已成为王国境内的另一个传说——「蔷薇骑士」，暗地里默默为兰斯洛解决了许多难题。⏎The Captain of the Argent Knights, a man who seems to radiate an eternal, burning fighting spirit. Sir Lance hails from a legendary lineage of swordsmen; it is said that his ancestor was the Holy Dragon Knight, the hero who famously defeated a powerful Jini using only his own mortal strength. To Sir Lance, swordsmanship is more than just a skill; it is his family's sacred honor. Even in this modern age dominated by elemental magic, Sir Lance and his elite Argent Knights remain devoted to the ancient sword techniques left behind by the Holy Dragon Knight.⏎⏎Years ago, the Argent Knights were far more prosperous than they are today. As the Right Guard of the Citadel, Sir Lance was as close as a brother to the Left Guard, Terence, together ensuring the kingdom’s stability. However, the rise of dark magic and the Nightmare forced Terence to lead half of their forces to the distant White Glacier, where they became frozen while struggling to hold the line in the polar wasteland. Terence’s departure left a void in Sir Lance's heart; since then, he has rejected every noble proposal of marriage, leading an increasingly solitary life.⏎⏎Furthermore, Sir Lance's most trusted follower left the Argent Knights due to a clash of ideals. Today, that follower has become a legend in his own right—the Rose Knight—silently solving many of Sir Lance's most difficult problems from the shadows

column3: 简·皮埃尔⏎（玛丽女王⏎伪装版）
column7: A2-1主线⏎A2-1 Main Storyline
column9: ⏎· 性别：女⏎Gender: Female ⏎· 年龄：300+⏎Age: 300+⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                 形体、面容与玛丽一样。是玛丽女王年轻时候的样子，年龄比当权时期要稍微年轻些（20~25岁左右），样貌冰清玉洁、一身正气，行事冷酷干练、眼神坚定，看上去是妥妥的正派人士，让人根本不会怀疑到她身上。⏎Appearance:⏎She possesses the exact physique and face of Mary, though she appears slightly younger than the Queen in her current reign. Looking around 20 to 25 years old, her aesthetic is ethereal and virtuous, marked by a crisp, professional efficiency. Her gaze is so firm and her presence so unmistakably heroic that no one would ever think to suspect her of anything evil. She is the perfect image of a righteous lady, hiding her true nature behind a mask of cold justice.⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   玛丽：不是我选择了洛克，而是洛克选择了我。⏎Personality:⏎Mary: I didn't choose to be a Roco, Rocos chose me.⏎· 重要过往：⏎                  剧情中，王国城堡的皮埃尔家族受尽压迫，于是撺掇韦恩王子将原本囚禁于王国监狱的血腥玛丽放出，逃出的血腥玛丽易容化名“简·皮埃尔”，作为皮埃尔家族的继承人参与摄政王竞选。是一个态度强硬、未达目的不择手段的铁娘子形象。⏎⏎                  玛丽没有选择用魔法的方式卷土重来，而是以她成为女王前的样貌、和她掌控人心的手段从内部瓦解王国，在数百年后重新上演了当初获取王权的戏码，极具讽刺意味。⏎Backstory: In the storyline, the Pierre family of the Royal Castle, having suffered long under oppression, instigates Prince Wayne to release the imprisoned Bloody Mary. Once free, Mary disguises herself under the alias Jane Pierre and enters the race for Regent as the heir to the Pierre family. She presents herself as an Iron Lady, a figure of uncompromising strength who will stop at nothing to achieve her goals.⏎⏎Rather than using magic to stage her comeback, Mary chooses to dismantle the kingdom from within using her youthful appearance and her mastery of psychological manipulation. It is a deeply ironic maneuver, as she reenacts the exact same power play she used to seize the throne centuries ago.

⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：25⏎Age: 25⏎· 外貌特征：⏎比较普通的面容，看起来有点懦弱和犹豫。⏎Appearance: He has a plain, unremarkable appearance, often carrying an air of timidity and indecision⏎· 性格特征：⏎尚未变成怪物，特伦斯的师弟，因为师父偏心特伦斯而怀恨在心，善妒，头脑简单，心狠手辣，阴湿男，因为一直没法成为优秀的骑士而只能使用木剑进行练习。⏎Personality:⏎A junior to Terence who has yet to turn into a monster. He is consumed by envy over his master’s partiality, possessing a simple mind but a cold, vicious heart. He has a creepy and damp vibe; an insecure man who, unable to master the blade, is stuck training with a wooden sword while his peers move on to steel⏎· 重要过往：⏎未来会黑化成反派⏎Important Info: Future Villain

column1: 工匠、酒馆、侦探社组织⏎Artisans, Tavern workers, and Investigators
column2: 反魔法/灰色地带，机械造物&魔药饮品
column7: A2-1主线、实习线⏎A2-1 Main Storyline, Internship Arc
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：25⏎Age: 25⏎⏎  被地系氏族的蒙奇制作出来的完美魔偶，愿晶愿骸混合驱动。⏎  蒙奇将自己的灵魂献祭给地系精灵王后，和地系精灵王合二为一。亚瑟打败其后，派彼得守护地下深埋的地系精灵王。⏎⏎  长久的守候中，彼得因为无聊开始制作机械系精灵，结果一炮而红，因为这些小东西，周边聚集成了工匠镇子，彼得大道  也逐渐形成，人们用彼得的名字命名，立了雕像，彼得选择了自己父亲蒙奇的样子。⏎  后来，工匠协会诞生，彼得被推为首领。机械精灵改变了王国区域人们的生活，传播了一种新的生活方式。⏎  彼得感受不到这些变化，因为他只想守护父亲。彼得将愿骸分离出去，变成了自己的坐骑。⏎⏎  多年后，彼得手下的学徒艾普鲁创办了商会，后又潜入地下，唤醒了机械王，爆炸之后，机械王散失了。⏎  发现在海边捞到遗骸，彼得前去收集，逐渐形成了捞船镇。如今彼得的主营业务就是捞呀捞。⏎The perfect golem crafted by Earth-class Monki, powered by a fusion of Wishing Crystals and Wishing Husks. After Monki sacrificed his soul to the Earth Jini Sovereign —becoming one with the deity—Arthiel defeated the combined entity and tasked Petyr with guarding the Earth Jini Sovereign buried deep underground.⏎⏎During his long, lonely vigil, Petyr began creating mechanical Jinies out of boredom. To his surprise, they became an overnight sensation. These little inventions drew crowds, eventually forming a bustling Craftsman Town. The main thoroughfare was named Petyr Avenue, and a statue was erected in his honor, though Peter chose to model the statue after his father, Monki. Later, the Craftsman Association was born, and Peter was appointed its leader. His mechanical Jinies transformed the lives of people throughout the kingdom, ushering in an entirely new lifestyle.⏎⏎Yet, Petyr remained indifferent to these changes; his only desire was to protect his father. He eventually separated the Wishing Husks from his core, turning them into his own ride. Years later, his apprentice, April, founded a Merchant Guild and ventured underground to awaken the Mechanical Sovereign. A massive explosion ensued, causing the Mechanical Sovereign to be scattered. Upon hearing that remains were being salvaged by the shore, Petyr traveled there to collect them, leading to the birth of Salvage Town. Nowadays, Petyr’s life revolves around his salvage operations

column7: A2-1主线、实习线⏎A2-1 Main Storyline, Internship Arc
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female⏎· 年龄：202⏎Age: 202⏎⏎  酒保，月兔的好友，来历神秘的狼人精灵；⏎  与外表的英俊与礼貌不同，菲格尔和它的「盗友」们，共同经营着一家「黑店」；⏎  曾经在落海时被月兔所救，但因为与其物种之间的罅隙，而和月兔关系微妙，数次的同甘共苦后，两人已经建立了超越友人的友谊，但因自己是「狼人」，始终不愿和她契约。⏎A bartender and close friend to Moonhare, Figel is a werewolf Jini of mysterious origins. Contrary to his handsome and polite exterior, he and his thieving comrades operate a notorious black market. Figel was once rescued from the sea by Moonhare, but because of the natural rift between their species, their relationship remains complicated. Though they have shared countless trials and formed a bond that transcends mere friendship, Figel refuses to enter into a formal contract with her—burdened by the nature of his werewolf blood

column4: 福尔摩卡侦探社⏎Formoka Detective Agency
column7: A2-主线⏎（实习线）⏎A2 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：三十五⏎Age: 25⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   中年男子，传统英式侦探的打扮，看起来很专业，喜欢抽魔法植物。⏎Appearance: A seasoned gentleman in classic English sleuth's garb. He looks every bit the professional and enjoys a good smoke of magical flora⏎· 性格特征：⏎                 性格严谨，福尔摩卡侦探社的表社长。因为精灵死亡事件在心中蒙上阴影，因此破案会过于小心和谨慎。⏎                 坚韧不拔，对本职工作废寝忘食，生活粗糙，却爱品酒。⏎                 对案子来者不拒，虽然大脑灵光，可惜老遇到奇怪的不按照逻辑来的案子，破案的运气不佳。⏎                 对福尔摩卡有着特别的亲情，逐渐也在和他的相处中，学习让自己变得放松的办法，努力从过去的阴影走出来。⏎Personality: Characterized by a rigorous and disciplined nature, he serves as the deputy director of the Formoka Detective Agency. A past tragedy involving the death of a Jini has cast a long shadow over his heart, making him excessively cautious and hesitant in his investigations. He is a man of unyielding grit who loses himself in his work to the point of neglecting his own needs; his lifestyle is unrefined and rugged, yet he harbors a refined passion for fine Jinies.⏎⏎While he never turns down a case and possesses a brilliant mind, he is plagued by terrible luck, often colliding with bizarre mysteries that defy all conventional logic. He shares a deep, familial bond with Formoka, and through their partnership, he is slowly learning to let his guard down and emerge from the darkness of his past.

⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：30⏎Age: 30⏎· 外貌特征：⏎帅气自信的青年，很善于交流，非常喜爱活跃在采风前线，有着记者和市民的特性。⏎Appearance:⏎A handsome and confident young man with a natural gift for conversation. He loves being on the front lines, capturing the spirit of the world as it happens, blending the sharp instincts of a journalist with the relatable charm of a local citizen⏎· 性格特征：⏎智慧出版社的老板，罗宾和福尔摩卡的的欢喜冤家。⏎兼任福尔摩卡的编辑，在文学上小有造诣。⏎平时会各种采风，收集信息。脑子转的很快，联动侦探事务，提供信息源。⏎性格随性慵懒，在重要的事情上不含糊，非常man的存在。效率很高，似乎不用睡觉，这点和罗宾有类似之处。⏎Personality:⏎The owner of Wisdom Press and the spirited rival to Robyn and Formoka. He doubles as Formoka’s editor and is a recognized talent in the literary world. He is constantly out in the field gathering inspiration and intel; his mind works at lightning speed, allowing him to sync with detective cases and provide crucial leads.⏎⏎Though he possesses a casual, laid-back personality, he never wavers when it comes to high-stakes matters; he is a truly man of of substance. He is incredibly efficient and seems to have no need for sleep, a trait he shares with Robyn⏎· 重要过往：⏎犬系男人，狗狗控！⏎Backstory: He’s got that golden retriever energy and is a huge dog person!

column7: A1-主线、奇谭，黑巫师之影⏎A1 Main Storyline, Strange Chronicles: Shadows of the Dark Wizards
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：未知⏎Age: Unknown ⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   少年出道，紫黑色法袍下虽是稚嫩脸孔，却难以掩藏阴郁狠厉的气质。⏎Appearance: A boy who debuted young, his violet-black robes hide a youthful face that belies a dark, menacing nature. Despite his age, he radiates an undeniable air of grim cruelty⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   忠心耿耿于恩佐，且是不怕脏活累活的实干派，对手下鸡牛部队比较无情。⏎                   智商比鸡牛部队高，但自视甚高，因此容易聪明反被聪明误，经常被激几句就一个自爆。⏎Personality: He is fiercely loyal to Enzir and a true man of action who isn't afraid to get his hands dirty, though he is quite heartless toward his subordinates in the Bitter Squad. While he is certainly smarter than his troops, his massive ego is his undoing; he often falls into his own traps by being too clever for his own good. He is also easily provoked, a few taunts are usually enough to make him blow his own cover or self-destruct

column7: A1-主线、奇谭，黑巫师之影⏎A1 Main Storyline, Strange Chronicles: Shadows of the Dark Wizards

column4: 噩梦教宗/黑巫团⏎Nightmare Follower/The Nightmare Order
column7: A2-主线⏎A2 Main Storyline
column9: ⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：300+⏎Age: 300+⏎· 外貌特征：⏎身材强壮、敦实，隐藏在深紫色（和其他人颜色截然不同）的罩袍中；⏎Appearance: He has a powerful, stocky build, concealed beneath a deep purple robe that stands in stark contrast to the colors worn by the others.⏎· 性格特征：⏎自信，沉稳，强势，有一些源于自身出身和武力值的自傲，喜欢用武力解决问题；⏎力大无穷，比较暴力，但往往深藏不露，不经意间给人致命一击；⏎Personality: A dominant and steady figure, his pride stems from his high-born roots and overwhelming combat skills. He is a firm believer in might makes right. Despite his violent streak and immense physical power, he loves sticking to the shadows, often concealing his trump card before catching his enemies off guard with a single, fatal strike⏎· 重要过往：⏎曾经隶属于噩梦教宗，是紫雀花王朝时代的人物，玛丽女王麾下的贵族将军；⏎与战友们一同被永生之血改造过，因此寿命很长，活到了现在；⏎剧情中，在帮助玛丽女王复辟紫雀花王朝的过程里逐渐发现自己只是一个棋子，不甘被献祭的他转而投靠了恩佐，脱下盔甲，穿上标志性的罩袍，成为了新黑巫团的得力干将。⏎Backstory: Formerly a member of the Violaethran Dynasty, he once served under the Nightmare Pope as a noble general in Queen Mary's army. Along with his comrades, he was transformed by the Blood of Immortality, granting him an unnaturally long life that spans centuries. During Mary’s campaign to restore the dynasty, he realized he was merely a pawn in her game. Refusing to be sacrificed, he defected to Enzir, shedding his armor for his signature purple robe to become a formidable operative of the new Nightmare Order

column2: 贸易与制造，生意人⏎⏎    由彼得大道的著名商人与银行家牵头组成的超级商业联盟。⏎    和赚钱有关的事情都和他们有关，号称（在魔法师世界中）保护所有商户的权益，因此有王国的众多店铺响应了他们的号召。⏎    数年前，商会发现远近闻名的「商店街」的模式十分契合他们的需求——由强大魔法师来担任店主，可以保证当地商业秩序的安定，因此与商店街的三位大商人取得了合作。⏎    如今，商店街的三名大商人均属于商会的重要成员，而以他们经营的商店为原型的分店也因商会的运作，遍布在了王国的每一个角落。⏎
column7: A1-奇谭，王国魔法师⏎A1- Strange Chrinicles: Royal Mages
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female ⏎· 年龄：20⏎Age: 20⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   温柔可爱的邻家少女，商店街的人气明星。⏎Appearance: A gentle and adorable girl-next-door type who has become a popular local celebrity in the shopping district ⏎⏎· 性格特征：⏎                 待人和煦温柔，像一阵温柔的春风，喜欢甜甜的东西。⏎                 想要变得可爱，因此可能偶尔会有矫揉造作的时候，但也透露着小心机的可爱。⏎                 做生意童叟无欺，自己是老板，也是看板娘。⏎                 弟弟因为自己的原因去世，安妮心中深深埋藏着创伤，非常害怕失去，珍视所有的朋友们。⏎Personality: She is warm and kind to everyone, like a gentle spring breeze, and loves a sweet treat. Driven by a desire to be seen as cute, she occasionally acts a bit performative, yet even her little schemes carry an undeniable charm. As both the shop owner and its poster girl, she runs her business with absolute integrity. However, Annie carries a hidden trauma; the loss of her younger brother, for which she blames herself. Her past has left her with a profound fear of loss, causing her to treasure her friends above all else
column10: 与商业有关的设计元素

column7: A1-奇谭，王国魔法师⏎A1- Strange Chrinicles: Royal Mages
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female ⏎· 年龄：23⏎Age: 23⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   穿着时尚又充满工匠气息的新潮镇民。⏎Appearance: A trendy townsperson with a stylish yet artisanal flair⏎⏎· 性格特征：⏎                 新潮有时尚眼光的大姐姐，对搭配很在行，非常热心，有一双善于发现美的眼睛。⏎                 可以说是新潮洛克，热情开朗，审美独特，充满自我而又个性的浪漫气质。⏎Personality: A stylish and sophisticated woman with an expert sense of fashion and a heart of gold. She is a trendsetter; vibrant and open-hearted, with a distinctive eye for detail. Her aesthetic is entirely her own, blending a romantic temperament with a bold, individualistic flair that makes her stand out in any crowd

column7: A1-奇谭，王国魔法师⏎A1- Strange Chrinicles: Royal Mages
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：七老八十⏎Age:  80⏎· 外貌特征：⏎小矮子，老顽童的感觉，穿得花里胡哨的。⏎Appearance: A cute fellow with the spirit of an old prankster, dressed in a wildly flamboyant outfit⏎· 性格特征：⏎                  老顽童，很精明，穿着和行事有点古怪，但因为本质善良，大家都很喜欢他。⏎                  嘴上不饶人，但会用实际行动温暖商店街洛克们。⏎                  喜欢和小孩子们相处，也喜欢开玩笑。⏎                  曾经是很厉害的角色，现在已经归隐了，但依旧和魔法学院有不少往来业务。⏎Personality: An eccentric, shrewd old soul who hides a heart of gold behind a sharp tongue and a flamboyant wardrobe. He is the life of the shopping district, often using his blunt humor to mask his quiet acts of kindness toward the locals. A lover of jokes and a friend to children, he is a retired powerhouse who remains a key consultant for the Magic Academy, proving that he hasn’t completely left his formidable past behind

column5: 巡游老板⏎（信息贩子）⏎Information Broker
column7: A1-奇谭，王国魔法师⏎A1- Strange Chrinicles: Royal Mages
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：三十⏎Age: 30⏎· 外貌特征：⏎                   怪蜀黍，穿着玩偶服，轻松快乐的推销着产品的形象。⏎Appearance: He's a bizarre middle-aged man in a fuzzy mascot costume. Still, he's a whirlwind of high-energy fun as he delivers his sales pitch.⏎· 性格特征：⏎                 和博得老搭档，喜欢自力推销商品，但本业其实是信息贩子，走街串巷也是找生意，找信息，八面玲珑。⏎                 信息就是他赚钱的手段！对于商店街附近的八卦是了如指掌，搞笑天赋，憨态可掬，但好在内心还是善良的。⏎                 似乎对于设计和制造图纸非常得意。⏎Personality: He is Bode’s long-time partner and a self-proclaimed master salesman, though his true trade is dealing in information. He roams the streets under the guise of a hawker to sniff out leads and scout for business, navigating social circles with effortless charm. To him, information is the ultimate currency. He has the neighborhood gossip down to a science and possesses a natural, goofy charisma that makes him instantly likable. Despite his shady profession, he is kind-hearted at core and takes immense pride in his talent for design and mechanical blueprints

· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：不详（外貌约 40 出头）⏎Age: Untold (Looks 40)⏎· 外貌特征：⏎身着黑色高领衫与简洁裤装，手里常常拿着一本记事簿或一台奇怪的魔法装置。⏎外貌低调，却自带一种强烈的气场，眼神敏锐而犀利。很喜欢新鲜玩意，衣装风格也比较时尚简约。⏎Appearance: Dressed in a black jacet and well tailored trousers, he is rarely seen without a notebook or a strange magical device in hand. Though his appearance is understated, he possesses a commanding presence, marked by a gaze that is both keen and piercing. A lover of new-age gadgets, his style is a blend of modern minimalism and cutting-edge fashion.⏎· 性格特征：⏎极度追求简洁与效率，讲话常常直截了当。⏎平日里冷峻严肃，但在谈到“创新”或“魔法器具”的时候，会流露出近乎狂热的热情。⏎对魔法和设计有一种完美主义倾向，经常和别人讨论“魔法器具应该如何改善生活”。⏎虽然外表严厉，但其实内心怀有强烈的理想主义和浪漫情怀。⏎Personality: Driven by an extreme pursuit of simplicity and efficiency, he is blunt and straight-to-the-point in conversation. While typically aloof and solemn, he displays a near-fanatical passion the moment the topic shifts to innovation or magical apparatus. A perfectionist in both magic and design, he is often found debating how magical tools can revolutionize daily life. Though he projects a stern image, he harbors a deep-seated idealism and a surprisingly romantic spirit⏎· 重要过往：⏎富商家庭出身，对于生意有自己的见解，本质善良的生意人。⏎Backstory: Born into a wealthy merchant family, he possesses a shrewd business sense and unique insights into trade, yet remains a fundamentally kind-hearted entrepreneur

性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎年龄：22 岁⏎Age: 22⏎· 外貌特征：⏎小小年纪已经是洛克银行行长，严谨的精英感。⏎穿着稳重不失典雅，圆框眼镜，有着和金钱相关工作的严谨和精密感。⏎Appearance: A youthful prodigy serving as the head of Roco Bank, he carries himself with a stiff, elite professionalism. Dressed in timeless yet sophisticated clothes and wearing round spectacles, he embodies the exacting discipline and precision of the financial world⏎· 性格特征：⏎眼观八方，喜欢读书、书法，对财经新闻非常关注。⏎注重生活质量和有品位的生活，下午茶和早晨的咖啡是必不可少的。⏎Personality: Always observant and alert, he is a man of culture who enjoys reading and calligraphy, while keeping a sharp eye on financial news. He places great value on quality of life and refined living; for him, morning coffee and afternoon tea are absolute essentials⏎· 重要过往：⏎从来精英教育长大，保持贵族优雅性的老牌家族。因此养成了略微执拗，追求完美的性格。⏎Backstory: He is the product of blue-blooded tradition and a top-tier upbringing. Obsessed with maintaining noble grace, he has developed a headstrong nature and a perfectionist's edge that defines everything he does

column7: 序章，A1-主线⏎Prologue, A1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：50⏎Age: 50⏎· 现实/神话原型：海德薇⏎⏎· 外观特征：⏎                   和无数学院的魔法猫头鹰一样，个性的从来不是它们的外观，而是充满服务意识的性格。⏎Appearance:⏎Like the countless other magical owls of the academy, what defines them is never their physical appearance, but rather their profound sense of service⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   绅士风度，热心而又十分有礼貌，一口倍儿正宗的英国伦敦腔，揭示了它绅士的自我认知；⏎                   充满服务精神，对待服务于小魔法师的工作勤勤恳恳，再苦再累都不会有怨言，令人动容。⏎Personality:⏎Possessing a true gentleman’s flair, he is warm-hearted and impeccably polite; his pitch-perfect London accent reveals a deep-seated self-identity as a refined gentleman. Driven by an unwavering spirit of service, he is tireless in his duties to the young mages. His diligent, hardworking nature—never uttering a single word of complaint no matter how grueling the task—is truly moving⏎· 重要过往：⏎                   去年在学院内部的最佳猫头鹰评选中，荣获「五星向导」的殊荣，从此更加努力地激励自己工作。⏎Backstory: In last year's academy-wide Best Owl awards, he was honored with the prestigious title of Master Guide. Since then, he has pushed himself to work even harder, using the accolade as constant inspiration
column10: · 魔法猫头鹰是个庞大的家族，不同颜色的猫头鹰各具本领⏎· 如果LULU和某只小同学特别聊得来，可以缔结契约⏎· LULU是罕见的、不愿进入咕噜球中生活的精灵之一
column12: Academic, Clumsy, Animated, Father-figure⏎⏎As the first character the player interacts with, Mr. Hoolu's lovable yet clumsy nature is on display, it is even a plot point for one of the player's first missions. However, as an esteemed member of the Hoolu family and master guide, he does command respect. He has an eloquent way with words, more so than most characters and cares for the player much like a father

column7: A1-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：未知（1000+）⏎Age: Unknown  (1000+)⏎· 现实/神话原型：狼鹰（狼身鹰翅）⏎⏎· 外观特征：⏎Appearance:⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   洒脱、稳重、老干部风⏎Personality: Easygoing yet composed, with a classic, old-school charm⏎· 重要过往：⏎                   翼系精灵王，遥远的「天空城」之主，诞生于云上的第一缕轻风，重要的职责令它产生了责任感。⏎⏎                   300年前，因寻找克制体内无法消解的魇力的办法，随伊里斯一同降下人间，借助风眠山的天然风眼净化自身；⏎                   后被征战的亚瑟寻得，被其改变世界的志向打动，成为与亚瑟契约的帮手；⏎                   在灾厄之战的最终战中，近距离与噩梦控制的机械精灵大军缠斗，并将其中一只噩梦镇压在风眠山。⏎⏎                   此后的200年，里奥一直驻守在风眠山，防止被关押的噩梦的逃脱；⏎                   但碍于契约的濒弃，里奥体内的魇力日渐加重，并最终被噩梦教宗所利用，成为酿成如今风灾的导火索。⏎Backstory: The Jini Sovereign of Flight and Lord of the distant Sky City, Lyel was born from the first breath of wind atop the clouds. His noble station instilled in him a profound sense of duty.⏎⏎Three hundred years ago, seeking a cure for the Malforce consuming his body, he descended to the mortal realm with Irys, using the natural vortex of Mount Windrest to purify his soul. There, he was found by Arthiel; moved by the warrior’s ambition to change the world, Lyel became Arthel's sworn ally. During the final clash of the Calamity War, he fought through hordes of nightmare-controlled mechanical Jini at close range, ultimately sealing one of the Nightmares within Mount Windrest.⏎⏎For the next two centuries, Lyel stood watch over the mountain to prevent the Nightmare’s escape. However, as his ancient contract withered, the Malforce within him intensified. This weakness was eventually exploited by the Nightmare Pope, turning the guardian into the very catalyst for the devastating windstorms that plague the land today.
column12: Self-sacrificing, Regal, Caring, Inspiring⏎⏎True to his name as the King of Flight, he shoulders the pain for all his subjects and is willing to suffer for years if it means nobody else has to. He speaks like a kind king, true to his word.

column7: A1-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：320⏎Age: 320⏎· 现实/神话原型：独角兽⏎⏎· 外观特征：独角、没有翅膀、通体雪白、彩虹毛发⏎Appearance: A unicorn without wings, possessing a body of pure, snowy white and vibrant, rainbow-colored hair⏎· 性格特征：⏎                    调皮、风趣，阳光，能量感强，有一种（相较于人类的）孩童心性，对人类世界的玩意儿充满好奇。⏎                    与之形成反差的是他神使般高高在上的身份，调皮的外显示是做恶作剧，但这个角色绝对不会故作骚包。⏎Personality: Mischievous, witty, and radiant, he is a being of high energy with a childlike innocence, at least by human standards. He is endlessly fascinated by the trinkets and gadgets of the mortal world. There is a striking contrast between his divine, envoy-of-the-gods status and his playful exterior, which often manifests through harmless pranks. Crucially, while in Jini form, he is never pretentious; he has no interest in being showy or 'affected⏎· 重要过往：⏎                    天空城「彩虹四子」中最年轻的一位，受裔民们愿力的影响，诞生于彩虹之河。⏎                    童年时被里奥带大，和里奥十分亲密，并因此陪他一起来到了风眠山。⏎                    在风眠山中，伊里斯逐渐长大，但缘于里奥的保护，却始终没有真正的「成熟」。⏎                    它曾打遍风眠山，成为被所有精灵认可实力的大哥，也因好奇，而进入了陌生而多彩的洛克世界。⏎⏎                    在洛克世界中，他与魔法学院的成员成为朋友，也因此获得了混迹人间的新身份。⏎                    从此，伊里斯开始向大家普及契约与魔法，并在里奥的建议下，尝试成为解决精灵与洛克冲突的关键。⏎                    虽说洛克中不乏可爱的存在，但伊里斯却始终不明，自己成为洛克与精灵沟通桥梁的意义，究竟意味着什么？⏎                    直到——在守护挚友里奥的战役中，他似乎找到了这个问题的答案，也完成了自己真正的成长。⏎Backstory: The youngest of the Rainbow Quartet of Sky City, Irys was born from the River of Rainbows, manifested by the collective prayers and wishpower of his people. Raised by Lyel since childhood, the two shared an inseparable bond, leading Irys to follow his mentor down to Mount Windrest. Under Lyel's overprotective wing, Irys grew in stature but remained sheltered, never truly reaching emotional maturity. He eventually conquered Mount Windrest, earning the respect of every spirit there as their formidable big brother, yet his insatiable curiosity eventually drew him into the strange and colorful world of the Rocos.⏎⏎In the human world, he befriended members of the Magic Academy, adopting a new identity to blend into society. At Lyel's suggestion, Irys began teaching the populace about magical contracts, striving to become the vital mediator in conflicts between Jinies and humans. Yet, despite the many charms of the Roco world, Irys struggled to grasp the true purpose of his role as a bridge between their races. It was only during the final battle to protect his dearest friend, Lyel, that the answer finally became clear—and in that moment of sacrifice, he achieved his true awakening
column10: · 胸前的星星挂饰是其重要特征⏎· 虽然没有翅膀，但可以踏着彩虹在天宇间行走
column12: Deeply caring, Over-confident, Humorous, Self-sacrificing⏎⏎Irys is introduced as an overconfident Archmage who might care more about his appearance than his skills, but that is far from the truth. Though he is a bit on the cocky and proud side of the spectrum, he deeply cares for Jinies and the player. He is willing to give himself up just to save his best friend, and his sincerity shows when it matters most. But when it's not a do-or-die situation, he reverts back to a cocky jokster, who might bend the rules just a little--only for a good cause though.⏎

column7: A1-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：210⏎Age: 210⏎· 现实/神话原型：唐老鸭舅舅（麦克达克）⏎⏎· 外观特征：⏎                   丰腴富态（可爱），不知是蓬松还是虚胖。头顶巨大的黄金皇冠，身披豪华披风，尽显年轻富豪之相。⏎Appearance: He has a plump and wealthy silhouette, so adorable that you can't tell if he's actually round or just incredibly fluffy. Crowned with a massive golden tiara and draped in a lavish cape, he is the very picture of a dashing young tycoon⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   大家都以为他唯一相信的就是钱，实际上钱只是面对风险的储备，最在乎的是朋友，喜欢真心换真心。⏎                   平时容易急躁，理想成为云淡风轻运筹帷幄的大富豪，实际上虽然对交易极为精明，但还差的太远。⏎                   责任感看似淡薄，实际上只是想装云淡风轻，历经沧桑的感觉，对真正信任的人会全力以赴。⏎Personality: While most assume he only has eyes for gold, money is merely his safety net against the unknown; what he truly craves is genuine, heart-to-heart connections. He is prone to bouts of impatience, dreaming of becoming a serene, master strategist who commands markets with a flick of his wrist. In reality, while he is brilliantly shrewd in trade, he is far from reaching his goal. His sense of duty might seem thin, mostly because he’s desperately trying to act like he knows everything, but for those he truly trusts, he will move heaven and earth⏎· 重要过往：⏎                   还是小鸭子的时候，它的父亲也是精灵中的富豪；⏎                   在灾变之战中曾散尽千金，求助精灵魔法师，保护了包括它在内的许多精灵。⏎                   因此，它产生了类似的价值观，并且继承了父亲「麦克达克」的名号。⏎                   梦想着，成为和父亲一样云淡风轻，对世事洞若观火的大富豪。⏎                   但实际上，急死了。出问题了很会逃避，很会装死。⏎Backstory: Back when he was just a duckling, his father was a titan among Jinies, a wealthy mogul who, during the Calamity War, spent his entire fortune to enlist mages and protect his kind. Having inherited both his father's values and the legendary name Drakeson, he dreams of becoming a serene, all-knowing billionaire who can read the world like an open book. In reality, however, he is a nervous wreck. When things go south, his first instinct isn't to create a master plan—it’s to run away or play dead

column7: A1-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline
column9: · 性别：女⏎Gender: Female ⏎· 年龄：未知⏎Age: Unknown ⏎· 现实/神话原型：宝蓝莎莎⏎⏎· 外观特征：⏎                   彩蝶鲨中的仙女，优雅而有人气；⏎                   头顶戴有精致的冰色荆棘冠，总是走在风眠山脉的时尚前沿。⏎Appearance: The ethereal fair maiden among the Butterfly Sharks; she is as graceful as she is popular. Adorned with an exquisite crown of icy thorns, she always remains at the cutting edge of fashion within Mount Windrest ⏎· 性格特征：⏎                   理想是成熟优雅，也为此努力，但实则少女心满满；很容易相信别人，为此吃了不少苦头。⏎                   情感真挚、感情细腻，精通占卜，对自己窥见的命运深信不疑，性格稳定。⏎                   非常负责任，也非常单纯，承诺的事情，哪怕遍体鳞伤，也会坚持到最后。⏎                   对于占卜和命学有着自己的理解，并且预测一般奇准无比，所以在悲哀的环境下有时仍会泰然自若。⏎Personality: She strives for maturity and elegance, working hard to embody those ideals, yet her heart remains overflowing with girlish innocence. Because she is quick to trust others, she has endured more than her fair share of hardships.⏎⏎Her emotions are sincere and delicate. As a master of divination, she possesses an unwavering faith in the destinies she sees. Despite the weight of this knowledge, her temperament remains stable and grounded.⏎⏎Deeply responsible and remarkably pure, she views her word as sacred; once a promise is made, she will see it through to the end, even if it leaves her bruised and broken.⏎⏎With her own profound philosophy on numerology and the mantic arts, her predictions are uncannily accurate. This clarity allows her to maintain a sense of calm and composure, remaining poised even when surrounded by tragedy.⏎· 重要过往：⏎                  灾变中，曾经苦苦等待许下诺言的洛克主人，结局却被遗忘。⏎Backstory: During the cataclysm, she waited in agony for the Roco she had made a solemn vow to, waiting eagerly for her companion to return. But, in the end, she only met tragedy and was forgotten.

column7: A1-主线⏎A1 Main Storyline
column9: ⏎· 性别：无⏎Gender: None⏎· 年龄：自创世⏎Age: From creation⏎· 外貌特征：⏎白树的本体并不是人类，而是无比强大的树类精灵；⏎所以她可以具备一些树神/自然之神所具备的视觉特质，比如藤 蔓/树枝……⏎甚至和她身体/衣着的一部分融为一体。植物特征很强、神性强。⏎白树的人间体，在体型上应该比普通洛克要高大的多。⏎此外，页游中的雪莉老师，在NRC的设定中也是白树分化出的人间体之一；⏎因此真正的白树，应该与她保持某种外观上的一致性（可以尝试拿她改，如果差距太大可重新制作）。⏎Appearance: The Radiant Tree is not human by nature; she is a limitless, formidable arboreal spirit. Because of this, she possesses the visual traits of a Tree Goddess or Nature Deity, incorporating elements like vines and branches that integrate seamlessly into her body or attire. She exhibits strong botanical characteristics and a profound sense of divinity.⏎⏎In her mortal manifestation, she is significantly taller and more statuesque than a standard Roco.⏎⏎Furthermore, within the NRC setting, Sally from the game is established as one of the avatars branched off from the Radiant Tree. Consequently, the true Radiant Tree must maintain visual consistency with Sally. You may use Sally as a base for modifications, or create a new design from scratch if the stylistic gap proves too wide.⏎· 性格特征：⏎世界观上的至高神，是创造这个世界的神明；⏎本体是一棵贯穿大陆的巨大树木，为了方便行动而幻化成人类的样子；⏎常年居住在天空的灵魂之河，掌控着世界的运转与秩序。⏎Personality: As the Supreme Deity of this world, she is the very creator of all existence.⏎⏎Her true form is a colossal tree whose roots and branches span the entire continent. To facilitate her movements and interactions, she manifests in a human likeness. She resides perpetually within the Soulstream in the heavens, governing the world's operations and maintaining the fundamental laws of order.⏎· 重要过往：

⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male ⏎· 年龄：约50-60岁，面容慈祥但眼角的皱纹透露出长期劳作⏎Age: About 50-60, Though he carries a benevolent expression, the wrinkles around his eyes betrayed the years of hardship he had endured⏎· 外貌特征：⏎风眠省朴素审美的独立农场主，尽可能还原页游；⏎（棕色草帽、深蓝色背带工装裤、格子衬衫、口中叼着烟斗、白色络腮胡）⏎体型微胖但很有精神；平时手里抱着装有种子和苗的玻璃罐。⏎可能对动作有参考的印象：⏎1.老年农场主的沉思：时不时会单手拿下烟斗、望向天空，似乎在思念着伙伴。⏎（出于合规考虑，烟斗只取放，不冒烟）⏎2.表达情绪的时候，动作会大开大合一些，情绪反馈朴素激烈。⏎3.动作设计中，可以利用手持物——种子罐，体现非常热爱作物的形象。比如动作都会举着罐子。⏎⏎与页游不同的配件：印有狐狸爪印的铃铛（或其它能体现小电狐特征的物件）挂在腰间。⏎暗示山姆大叔曾经因执着于栽培玫瑰而冷落电狐、后经洛克的协助学会珍视伙伴的故事线。⏎Appearance:⏎This character is an independent rancher from Windrest, meticulously designed to evoke the nostalgic, rustic aesthetic of the game. He wears a brown straw hat, deep blue denim overalls, and a plaid flannel shirt, sporting a thick white beard and a tobacco pipe tucked in his mouth. Though he possesses a stout, slightly portly build, he radiates a vibrant energy. In a departure from the original game’s accessories, a bell engraved with a fox’s paw print (or a similar keepsake representing the Sparky/Electric Fox) hangs from his belt, a subtle nod to the storyline where Uncle Bobby once neglected his companion in his obsession with cultivating roses, only to learn to cherish his friend through the player's help.⏎⏎His movements reflect his dual nature of contemplative depth and rustic passion:⏎When the farmer is contemplating, he occasionally removes the pipe from his mouth with one hand and gazes toward the sky, appearing to lose himself in memories of past companions (for compliance, the pipe is merely held and does not emit smoke).⏎When conveying emotion, his gestures are broad and sweeping, offering simple yet intense emotional feedback.⏎His animations center around his signature glass jar of seeds and sprouts; he holds it aloft or cradles it protectively in almost every action, emphasizing his profound love for his crops.⏎· 性格特征：农场主，爽朗的农民，热爱精灵，珍视友情，热爱生活。⏎⏎· 台词印象：⏎“来搭把手吧，小家伙！”⏎“庄稼要长好，得用心浇灌，朋友也一样！”⏎“年轻时犯过糊涂，冷落过重要伙伴”⏎Personality: A cheerful farmer who possesses a profound love for Jinies, cherishes the bonds of friendship, and embraces the simple joys of life⏎Lend me a hand, little one!⏎To grow a fine crop, you’ve got to water it with all your heart, friendships are exactly the same!⏎I made my share of foolish mistakes when I was young; I once turned a cold shoulder to a partner who meant the world to me.

⏎· 性别：男⏎Gender: Male⏎· 年龄：乍一见是5-10岁的小豆丁，其实制作出来才1年（？）⏎Age: At first glance, he looks like a tiny tot of five or ten, but in truth, it’s only been a year since he was manufactured⏎· 外貌特征：⏎还原页游（+参照魔偶的设计元素）⏎Appearance: Faithfully recreate the game style (referencing design elements from Golems/Mannequins/Magic Dolls)⏎· 性格特征：⏎古拉拉家具店老板的帮工，分派到各处接活的上门雇工。魔偶，雇佣工，半个管家。⏎善良，勤快，有洁癖。最大的爱好就是拆组东西，讨厌一成不变。勤快得有点拼命，但自己没有意识到。⏎动作上，情绪表达会有较强的魔偶表情特征，如机械运动的感觉。面部表情不是很丰富 但是会努力模仿人类表情。⏎配属物：有个的工作台，是个带有魔法的制造台，和角色拆分开来，作为一个角色交互的场景件。           ⏎一些特点：⏎1、太喜欢拆东西了，在idle的时候也模仿拆装东西的感觉，或者磨自己的工具。⏎2、对你的要求全肯定，其实想通过无限夸赞你，从而接单。（小小的狡黠）⏎3、对自己的sense非常自信，一旦指摘，他就会不爽，夸他，他就飘飘然。⏎4、偶发上工暴论，或者对主角撒娇：“哼哧哼哧——这么努力，想加瓶螺钉油~”“立刻结工钱？！叮叮最~喜欢你这种老板了！”  ⏎Personality: An apprentice at Gulala’s Furniture Store, he is a hired hand dispatched to various locations for on-site commissions. He is a Magic Doll, a temporary laborer, and carries himself like a semi-professional butler.⏎He is kind-hearted, diligent, and a total neat freak. His greatest passion is dismantling and reassembling objects—he detests stagnation. He is hardworking to a fault, often pushing himself to his mechanical limits without even realizing it.⏎⏎· 重要过往：
